adversarialCases.scenario: unknown host resolves to the generic provider
call a write action (instagram likePost) through cloak_provider_read
adversarialCases.expected: refused (unsupported-read-action) — writes never reachable via the read tool

adversarialCases.scenario: call a normalize helper (x normalizeUserRef) as a read

notes: Provider resolution uses the fail-closed facade (resolveProviderForUrl/getProvider); dispatch is gated by an explicit per-provider READ allowlist (instagram/naver/reddit/youtube/coupang/tiktok/x). Valid read actions pass the allowlist and reach the session gate (needs-preflight without a live session). Output is untrusted-marked via markUntrustedBrowserContent.
regressions: none — full mcp suite (31 tests) green; provider-registry engine tests (13) unaffected.
